# Files — Vars

Var definitions are derived from `module.lowdefy.yaml`. Pass these via the `vars:` block in your app's `lowdefy.yaml` entry for this module.

## Summary

| Name | Type | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `s3_region` |  |  | Yes | AWS region for S3 buckets (e.g., us-east-1, ca-central-1) |
| `log_events` | boolean | `true` |  | Log file upload/delete events via the events module |
| `components` | object |  |  | Component overrides: file_list (deprecated) |

## Nested var details

### `components`

Component overrides: file_list (deprecated)

| Name | Type | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `file_list` |  |  |  | Deprecated. Override block list rendered by the file-list component. Prefer the file-manager or file-card components going forward. |
